description_long: This is a compact, vintage-style yellow car with a rounded, classic body shape reminiscent of mid-20th-century European city vehicles. The car features two doors, chrome trim around the windows, and a small, sloped hood with circular headlights and a simple front grille. The rear of the car has a single rear window, a vented engine cover, and a black license plate with white text. The wheels are small and set within pronounced wheel arches, and the side mirrors are mounted on the doors. The overall design is utilitarian yet charming, with a focus on efficient urban mobility and retro aesthetics.
description: A small, vintage yellow city car with rounded features, chrome trim, and classic circular headlights.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded hood, circular headlights, small grille, and windshield wipers.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the two-door layout, chrome window trim, and compact wheelbase.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the vented engine cover, single rear window, and black license plate.
description_view_3: Left side view similar to the right, showing the two-door configuration and smooth, curved body.
attribute_headlight_design: Dual round headlights, single on each side, classic chrome bezel
